blended.narrative: Whiteface is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,830 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 19°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
